OnCommand Insight:
Affected by only CVE-2026-21925 and CVE-2026-21933.
Data Infrastructure Insights Storage Workload Security Agent:

"kb_summary": "Multiple NetApp products incorporate the Oracle Java Platform, Standard Edition (Java SE). Java SE versions 8u471, 8u471-b50, 8u471-perf, 11.0.29, 17.0.17, 21.0.9, and 25.0.1 are susceptible to vulnerabilities that could allow an unauthenticated attacker with network access via multiple protocols to compromise Oracle Java SE. Refer to “Oracle Critical Patch Update Advisory - January 2026” for additional details. If a product requires JRE but does not include it, please update JRE to a fixed version that aligns with the product requirements.

Updating the Java Runtime Environment (JRE) used by SANtricity Storage Manager 11.10 or later

In Full Support versions of OnCommand Workflow Automation and Active IQ Unified Manager for Linux & Windows the Java software can be upgraded as specified in the product documentation. For assistance with upgrade issues please consult technical support.

In Full Support versions of OnCommand Insight the Java software can be upgraded. For assistance with the upgrade and access to the updated OnCommand Insight binaries please consult technical support.

", "modified_date": null, "ntap_advisory_id": "NTAP-20260123-0012", "published_date": "2026-01-23T00:00:00", "updated_date": "2026-07-10T00:00:00"}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

mitigations:
If a product requires JRE but does not include it, please update JRE to a fixed version that aligns with the product requirements.

Updating the Java Runtime Environment (JRE) used by SANtricity Storage Manager 11.10 or later

In Full Support versions of OnCommand Workflow Automation and Active IQ Unified Manager for Linux & Windows the Java software can be upgraded as specified in the product documentation. For assistance with upgrade issues please consult technical support.

In Full Support versions of OnCommand Insight the Java software can be upgraded. For assistance with the upgrade and access to the updated OnCommand Insight binaries please consult technical support.
products: Active IQ Unified Manager for VMware vSphere
Data Infrastructure Insights and Data Secure Storage Workload Security Agent

title: January 2026 Java Platform Standard Edition Vulnerabilities in NetApp Products
